Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

5.0/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Onyx Towing to get the job done right.

“These guys saved me when my alternator died during rush hour on the IDL. Driver knew exactly how to position the truck to avoid blocking more lanes. Had me towed to a honest mechanic on Admiral instead of some overpriced downtown shop. Even gave me a ride home to Kendall Whittier.”

Marcus W. Emergency Towing
Mar 15, 2025

“Locked my keys in my running Kia at Turkey Mountain trailhead on a 100° day. Onyx had someone there in 25 minutes with the right tools to pop the lock without damage. Technician noticed my battery terminals were corroded and cleaned them up for free - said Tulsa's humidity causes that a lot.”

Jasmine R. Roadside Assistance
Apr 22, 2025

“Crashed my Harley near Chandler Park after hitting gravel. Onyx's bike specialist arrived quickly, knew how to lift it without scratching the custom paint, and recommended a great Tulsa shop for the repairs. Even called next day to check on me. These guys actually ride themselves - you can tell.”

Derrick S. Motorcycle Towing
May 18, 2025

“We've used Onyx for 3 years at our midtown storage facility. Their drivers document every unauthorized vehicle perfectly and know how to maneuver our tight lot. Never had a single complaint about damage - unlike our previous provider. Their online tracking system saves us hours of paperwork.”

Tulsa Storage Co. Private Property Towing
Jan 30, 2025

“Our food truck broke down blocking a lane on Cherry Street during Mayfest. Onyx had a heavy-duty wrecker there in 40 minutes that could handle our 26-footer without unloading. Driver worked with event staff to minimize disruption and got us to our shop without spilling any of the cooking oil.”

Lena P. Heavy Duty Towing
May 5, 2025

“Hit black ice on Yale Ave and ended up in a ditch at 2 AM. Onyx's driver brought blankets and made sure I was okay before even hooking up the car. Knew exactly which Tulsa body shops would still be open and helped me call my insurance. True lifesavers during that freeze last January.”

Carlos M. Emergency Towing
Jan 12, 2025
Onyx Towing

Trusted towing professionals serving Tulsa, OK and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.

555-tow-r93
